name: Deconstruct Robot Cell
description: Deconstruct a RobotCell into its robot model, registered rigid bodies and tools, and a matching default RobotCellState. The inverse of registering models via Load Robot Cell.

inputParameters.name: robot_cell
inputParameters.description: The RobotCell to deconstruct (typically the output of a Load Robot Cell component).

outputParameters.name: rigid_bodies
outputParameters.description: The registered RigidBody models (values of `cell.rigid_body_models`), in no particular order.

outputParameters.name: tools
outputParameters.description: The registered ToolModel tools (values of `cell.tool_models`), in no particular order.

outputParameters.name: default_cell_state
outputParameters.description: The default RobotCellState for this cell: every tool/body present but nothing attached. The same state Load Robot Cell returns.
